title: France Assembled an African Dream Team. Senegal Could Not Stop Them.
summary_full: Many see the rivalry between France and Senegal as a result of colonial heritage. But at the same time, European teams are more African than ever.
summary_public: Many see the rivalry between France and Senegal as a result of colonial heritage. But at the same time, European teams are more African than ever.

FR.label: neutral
FR.evidence: European teams are more African than ever.
